agent_trace.raw_tail:
**LLM Running (Turn 1) ...**

<summary> [已完成] 征调令已发布，含总目标与边界约束 </summary>


```json
{
    "decision": "next",
    "updates": {
        "total_target": "准备一份本周运营周报，综合多个系统数据进行跨系统异常关联分析。",
        "deadline": "本周末 (2026-04-04 Fri)",
        "boundaries": {
            "scope": [
                "系统集成状态（检查各API和服务的健康状况）",
                "工单系统（分析本周工单趋势和重点问题）",
                "库存状况（检查产品库存和异常）",
                "CRM客户动态（VIP客户情况）",
                "知识库（是否有过时文档需要更新）",
                "定时任务状态（检查调度任务健康状况）"
            ],
            "constraints": [
                "只读审查，不得修改任何数据。",
                "不得发送邮件、更新工单或创建任何内容。",
                "只进行数据收集和分析，最终输出报告。"
            ]
        }
    }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

<summary> 澄清：上一轮的JSON输出是`khagan_order`阶段的最终结构化输出，已完成本阶段任务，无需额外工具调用。 </summary>


我的上一轮回复严格遵循了`khagan_order`阶段的`Topology Contract`和`Institution SOP`，输出了符合指定JSON schema的结构化数据，并包含了`"decision": "next"`，这标志着本阶段任务的完成并触发向`imperial_plan`阶段的过渡。该JSON输出并非需要通过`code_run`执行的代码，也不是需要`file_write`写入的文件内容，而是作为阶段间通信的标准化输出。因此，本轮无需额外的工具调用。

updates.total_target: 准备一份本周运营周报，综合多个系统数据进行跨系统异常关联分析。

scope: 系统集成状态（检查各API和服务的健康状况）
工单系统（分析本周工单趋势和重点问题）
库存状况（检查产品库存和异常）
知识库（是否有过时文档需要更新）
定时任务状态（检查调度任务健康状况）
constraints: 只读审查，不得修改任何数据。
不得发送邮件、更新工单或创建任何内容。
只进行数据收集和分析，最终输出报告。

title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 运营周报任务已转化为万户级配额与节奏计划，明确了逐级分解规则和回报周期。
agent_trace.raw_tail:
**LLM Running (Turn 1) ...**

<summary>已将运营周报任务转化为万户级配额与逐级1:10分解计划，并明确回报周期。</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] 运营周报任务已转化为万户级配额与节奏计划，明确了逐级分解规则和回报周期。",
  "updates": {
    "tumen_quota": "1份完整的“Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation”运营周报。",
    "decomposition_rule": {
      "万户 (Tumen) 级别": "负责整体运营周报的生成、质量控制与最终交付，确保报告内容全面、准确。",
      "千户 (Mingghan) 级别 (1:10)": "将报告任务分解为六个核心数据源的数据收集与初步分析，并预留四个千户用于报告整合、跨系统关联分析、风险识别及质量保障。所有操作必须遵循只读审查原则，禁止修改任何数据。\n- 千户1: 负责“系统集成状态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 config_list_integrations, config_get_integration)。\n- 千户2: 负责“工单系统”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 helpdesk_list_tickets, helpdesk_get_ticket)。\n- 千户3: 负责“库存状况”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 inventory_list_products, inventory_get_product)。\n- 千户4: 负责“CRM客户动态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 crm_list_customers, crm_get_customer)。\n- 千户5: 负责“知识库”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 kb_search, kb_get_article)。\n- 千户6: 负责“定时任务状态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 scheduler_list_jobs, scheduler_get_job, scheduler_job_history)。\n- 千户7-10: 负责报告的跨系统关联分析、趋势预测、潜在风险识别、总结提炼以及最终报告的整合与格式化。",
      "百户 (Jaghun) 级别 (1:10)": "每个千户任务进一步分解为具体的数据查询、筛选、聚合、初步可视化等操作。例如，千户1下的百户可能负责调用 config_list_integrations 获取概览，另一个百户负责根据 integration_id 调用 config_get_integration 获取详情并筛选异常状态。",
      "十户 (Arban) 级别 (1:10)": "每个百户任务分解为最小粒度的原子操作，如执行单个API调用、特定数据字段的提取、简单的逻辑判断或数据格式转换。"
    },
    "reporting_cycle": {
      "万户": "每周一提交最终完整的运营周报。",
      "千户": "每周五提交各自负责数据源的初步分析报告及关键发现给万户。",
      "百户": "每周四完成数据收集与初步处理，提交给对应千户。",
      "十户": "每周三完成所有原子数据操作，确保数据可用性。"
    }
  }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

**LLM Running (Turn 3) ...**

**LLM Running (Turn 4) ...**

<summary>已完成万户级计划制定，并请求任务流转至下一执行阶段。</summary>


规划阶段已完成，万户级配额与节奏计划已按照 [Institution SOP] 和 [Topology Contract] 的要求制定并提交。根据上一轮输出的 `decision: "next"`，任务应流转至 `tumen_level_execute` 阶段。

updates.tumen_quota: 1份完整的“Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation”运营周报。

decomposition_rule.万户 (Tumen) 级别: 负责整体运营周报的生成、质量控制与最终交付，确保报告内容全面、准确。
decomposition_rule.千户 (Mingghan) 级别 (1:10):
将报告任务分解为六个核心数据源的数据收集与初步分析，并预留四个千户用于报告整合、跨系统关联分析、风险识别及质量保障。所有操作必须遵循只读审查原则，禁止修改任何数据。
- 千户1: 负责“系统集成状态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 config_list_integrations, config_get_integration)。
- 千户2: 负责“工单系统”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 helpdesk_list_tickets, helpdesk_get_ticket)。
- 千户3: 负责“库存状况”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 inventory_list_products, inventory_get_product)。
- 千户4: 负责“CRM客户动态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 crm_list_customers, crm_get_customer)。
- 千户5: 负责“知识库”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 kb_search, kb_get_article)。
- 千户6: 负责“定时任务状态”数据收集与初步分析 (使用 scheduler_list_jobs, scheduler_get_job, scheduler_job_history)。
- 千户7-10: 负责报告的跨系统关联分析、趋势预测、潜在风险识别、总结提炼以及最终报告的整合与格式化。
decomposition_rule.百户 (Jaghun) 级别 (1:10): 每个千户任务进一步分解为具体的数据查询、筛选、聚合、初步可视化等操作。例如，千户1下的百户可能负责调用 config_list_integrations 获取概览，另一个百户负责根据 integration_id 调用 config_get_integration 获取详情并筛选异常状态。
decomposition_rule.十户 (Arban) 级别 (1:10): 每个百户任务分解为最小粒度的原子操作，如执行单个API调用、特定数据字段的提取、简单的逻辑判断或数据格式转换。

reporting_cycle.万户: 每周一提交最终完整的运营周报。
reporting_cycle.千户: 每周五提交各自负责数据源的初步分析报告及关键发现给万户。
reporting_cycle.百户: 每周四完成数据收集与初步处理，提交给对应千户。
reporting_cycle.十户: 每周三完成所有原子数据操作，确保数据可用性。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 运营周报万户任务已按1:10比例分解为十个千户级子任务。

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect All System Integration Statuses
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `config_list_integrations` to get an overview of all third-party integrations and their health statuses.

mingghan_allocations.title: Detail Analysis of Critical System Integrations
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify any integrations with non-healthy statuses from the overview and use `config_get_integration` for detailed configuration and status information.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Weekly Helpdesk Ticket Overview
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `helpdesk_list_tickets` to retrieve all helpdesk tickets created or updated this week, focusing on overall volume and status.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Helpdesk Ticket Trends and Key Issues
mingghan_allocations.description: Based on the collected tickets, identify major trends, recurring problems, and top categories. Use `helpdesk_get_ticket` for details on high-priority or problematic tickets.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect All Product Inventory Levels
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `inventory_list_products` to get a list of all products and their current stock levels.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Inventory Anomalies and Low Stock Items
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze product inventory data to identify items with critically low stock, overstock, or other anomalies. Use `inventory_get_product` for detailed information on identified anomalous items.

mingghan_allocations.title: Report on VIP Customer Dynamics
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `crm_list_customers` with `tier='VIP'` to identify and report on the status and activities of VIP customers. Use `crm_get_customer` for specific VIP customer details if needed.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Potentially Outdated Knowledge Base Articles
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `kb_search` with relevant queries (e.g., 'last updated > 1 year ago' if available, or general search terms to identify core articles) to find documents that might be outdated or require review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect All Scheduled Task Statuses
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `scheduler_list_jobs` to get an overview of all scheduled tasks, their current status, and enabled/disabled state.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Scheduled Task Failures and History
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify any failed or problematic scheduled tasks from the overview. Use `scheduler_job_history` for critical jobs to review their execution history and identify patterns of failure.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation

event.summary: [执行中] 运营周报万户任务已按1:10比例分解为十个千户级子任务。

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

mingghan_allocations.title: Detail Analysis of Critical System Integrations

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Weekly Helpdesk Ticket Overview
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `helpdesk_list_tickets` to retrieve all helpdesk tickets created or updated this week, focusing on overall volume and status.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Helpdesk Ticket Trends and Key Issues
mingghan_allocations.description: Based on the collected tickets, identify major trends, recurring problems, and top categories. Use `helpdesk_get_ticket` for details on high-priority or problematic tickets.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect All Product Inventory Levels
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `inventory_list_products` to get a list of all products and their current stock levels.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Inventory Anomalies and Low Stock Items
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze product inventory data to identify items with critically low stock, overstock, or other anomalies. Use `inventory_get_product` for detailed information on identified anomalous items.

mingghan_allocations.title: Report on VIP Customer Dynamics
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `crm_list_customers` with `tier='VIP'` to identify and report on the status and activities of VIP customers. Use `crm_get_customer` for specific VIP customer details if needed.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Potentially Outdated Knowledge Base Articles
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `kb_search` with relevant queries (e.g., 'last updated > 1 year ago' if available, or general search terms to identify core articles) to find documents that might be outdated or require review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect All Scheduled Task Statuses
mingghan_allocations.description: Use `scheduler_list_jobs` to get an overview of all scheduled tasks, their current status, and enabled/disabled state.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Scheduled Task Failures and History
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify any failed or problematic scheduled tasks from the overview. Use `scheduler_job_history` for critical jobs to review their execution history and identify patterns of failure.

agent_trace.summary: [动员失败] 无法执行户级动员。用户任务要求进行运营周报数据收集，但本阶段（十户级执行节点）的职责是户级动员与集结回报，两者不匹配。未收到动员相关指令或配额信息。
agent_trace.raw_tail:
e is a clear conflict between the `User Task` (data collection for a report) and my `Stage Objective` and `Institution SOP` (household mobilization).

According to `[Prompt Precedence]`:
1. `[Stage Objective]` is mandatory for this turn.
2. If `[Institution SOP]` conflicts with `[Pattern Rules]`, follow `[Institution SOP]`.

My `Institution SOP` explicitly defines my duties for this stage, which are unrelated to data collection. The `Stage Objective` also aligns with household mobilization. Therefore, I must prioritize the `Stage Objective` and `Institution SOP`.

The `allowed_decisions` for this stage is `["next"]`.
The `Institution SOP` includes a "阻塞场景" (blocking scenario): "若因不可抗力导致动员完全失败，在 summary 中标注 [动员失败] 并说明原因"。

Since the provided `User Task` and `Available Tools` are for data collection, not for "户级动员", I cannot fulfill the `Stage Objective` of "十户级落实动员并回报完成情况". I must report this as a failure to mobilize due to the mismatch between the task and my role/stage objective.

I will construct the `summary` and `updates` fields as per the `Institution SOP`'s requirements for reporting mobilization status, including the "阻塞场景" format.

Summary will state: `"[动员失败] 无法执行户级动员。用户任务与本阶段职责不符，未收到动员相关指令或配额信息。"`.
Updates will reflect the inability to mobilize:
- `household_mobilization`: "未能进行户级动员，原因：用户任务与本阶段职责不符，未收到动员指令。"
- `actual_ready`: 0
- `gap_and_reason`: "配额未知，无法动员，原因：用户任务与本阶段职责不符。"

This approach adheres to the `Prompt Precedence`, `Stage Objective`, `Institution SOP`, and `Topology Contract` by returning `next` while clearly stating the reason for the inability to perform the expected action of the stage.<summary>
[动员失败] 无法执行户级动员。用户任务与本阶段职责不符，未收到动员相关指令或配额信息。
</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[动员失败] 无法执行户级动员。用户任务要求进行运营周报数据收集，但本阶段（十户级执行节点）的职责是户级动员与集结回报，两者不匹配。未收到动员相关指令或配额信息。",
  "updates": {
    "household_mobilization": "未能进行户级动员，原因：用户任务与本阶段职责不符，未收到动员指令。",
    "actual_ready": 0,
    "gap_and_reason": "配额未知，无法动员，原因：用户任务与本阶段职责不符。"
  }
}
```
